div.h1: Robin Hood Hash Insert: Step-by-Step Flow

div.p: Robin Hood Check: if my_distance > probe_dist[slot]: → This entry traveled less → STEAL THE SLOT
displaced = slot's (key, value, dist) slot ← (K, value, my_distance) K ← displaced.key my_distance ← displaced.dist
keys[slot] = K values[slot] = value probe_dist[slot] = my_distance metadata[slot] = OCCUPIED count++
Entries with longer probe distances "steal" from entries with shorter distances, ensuring:

ul.li: Bounded max probe: O(log n) even at 90% load
